name: @umbraculum/spike-validation-library
description: Phase 1 spike: Zod v4 vs Valibot side-by-side per docs/rfcs/0003-validation-library-adoption.md

scripts.bundle:zod: esbuild zod/index.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/zod.bundle.js && gzip -kf dist/zod.bundle.js && ls -la dist/zod.bundle.js.gz
scripts.bundle:valibot: esbuild valibot/index.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/valibot.bundle.js && gzip -kf dist/valibot.bundle.js && ls -la dist/valibot.bundle.js.gz
